_comment: Plan D — fill paper PRX 2015 Fig 1 + Fig 2 coverage gaps. Adds 4 long-time runs at canonical (phi, T0) coordinates the paper sweeps. Run via: python scripts/run_experiment.py configs/plan_d_paper_coverage.json. Naming convention phi<N>_T<M> = (phi=N/10, T0=M).

campaign.notes: Paper Fig 1 row T0=0.1 — low-T0 case with long plateau, slope expected to reach ~0.6 by t=20000 tau
Paper Fig 1 row T0=1 + Fig 2 row phi=0.3 (shared anchor) — fills both sweeps, slope expected ~0.55-0.60 (similar to E5/E6/E7)
Paper Fig 1 row T0=10 — high-T0 case, transient very long, slope likely ~0.3-0.4 (still in transient at 20000 tau)
Paper Fig 2 row phi=0.1 — low-density case, transient long, slope likely ~0.4-0.5

aggregation.title: PRX 2015 — full Fig 1 + Fig 2 paper-coverage (E1v3 + E5-E8 + Plan D)
